description_long: This house features a modern, open-plan layout with multiple distinct zones, including a main living area, a central garden or green space, and several outdoor patios. The structure is predominantly white with clean, angular lines and large windows, providing a sense of spaciousness and light. There are visible swimming pools and landscaped areas, suggesting luxury and a focus on outdoor living. The house appears to be single-story with flat roofs, and the arrangement of rooms and outdoor spaces is highly organized and geometric. Trees and shrubs are strategically placed around the property, enhancing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The entryway is broad and welcoming, with a clear path leading to the main door and flanked by greenery.
description: A modern, single-story luxury house with flat roofs, large windows, swimming pools, and landscaped gardens, arranged in a geometric layout with open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main living area, central green space, and a pool, with landscaped gardens and a broad entry path.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the main entryway, symmetrical garden layout, and the open, inviting design of the house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rear outdoor patio, additional pool, and more private garden areas.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the main living area, with visible large windows and access to outdoor spaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide, open entry with a broad path, flanked by landscaped greenery and minimalistic modern door
